creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2011-11-19 18:14:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    graphics             Makefile 
  Added files:
    graphics/electrix    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  eLectrix is an application to view Portable Document Format (PDF) files.
  Features:
  - zoom an rotation
  - basic text search
  - basic navigation history
  - fullscreen mode
  - tabs
  
  WWW:    http://electrix.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/162525
  Submitted by:   Olivier Duchateau <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com>
  Feature safe: yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1471    +1 -0      ports/graphics/Makefile
  1.1       +55 -0     ports/graphics/electrix/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/graphics/electrix/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/graphics/electrix/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/graphics/electrix/pkg-plist (new)
